authorization.scope: narrow open-result and recovery-classification correction discovered before recovery implementation

discovered_gaps.open_result: Opened and RecoveryOpened returned only ProjectStoreSession even though opening must also restore the validated ProjectGenerationProjection.
discovered_gaps.classification: The four accepted recovery classifications describe autosave relations only, but the accepted candidate origins also include manual previous, manual recovery, and manual generations found by a bounded orphan scan.
discovered_gaps.risk: A caller could not receive opened project state, and manual fallback could be mislabeled as an autosave relation or silently treated as authority.

correction.opened_result: successful Opened and RecoveryOpened completions carry (ProjectStoreSession, ProjectGenerationProjection) in that order
correction.created_result: Created remains session-only because its caller supplied the created projection
correction.candidate_inspection: inspection may decode projection state internally for bounded validation but never returns or exposes it
correction.manual_branch: manual previous, manual recovery, and manual orphan candidates use a distinct manual_branch classification
correction.autosave_relations: provisional, newer, stale, and divergent remain autosave classifications; an orphan autosave is classified from its own base and revision facts
correction.selection: every explicitly selected recovery projection opens dirty as an unsaved branch; session head IDs remain the actual ref facts and selection never repairs, promotes, or rewrites a ref

evidence: compile-checked tuple payloads for both state-restoring completions
focused classification evidence distinguishing a manual branch from a divergent autosave
unchanged public root, dependency, fixture, and wire guards
stop_condition: Any persisted byte, ref behavior, command, fault, dependency, public root, product wiring, or recovery filesystem execution must change.
rollback: revert this correction before recovery implementation; the project store remains off-product
